use_codes.desc: FOR THE PREPARATION OF SKIN PRIOR TO SURGERY; HELPS REDUCE BACTERIA THAT CAN POTENTIALLY CAUSE SKIN INFECTION

indications.text:
3MTM SoluPrepTM Film-Forming Sterile Surgical Solution (3M CHG/IPA Prep) is indicated for
use as a patient preoperative skin preparation, for preparation of the skin prior to surgery, and
to help reduce bacteria that can potentially cause skin infection.

3MTM SoluPrepTM S Sterile Antiseptic Solution (3M SoluPrep S) is indicated for use as a patient
preoperative skin preparation, for preparation of the skin prior to surgery, and to help reduce
bacteria that can potentially cause skin infection.
